resultList.dtldesc: If you have been looking for a comfortable residence in Navi Mumbai, we have a wonderful deal for you Nestled in the most amazing and developing localities of Navi Mumbai, this 5 to 10-year-old 1 BHK Flat is available for sale in Krishna Villa, Ulwe, Navi Mumbai. Enjoy a balanced lifestyle with lush green spaces and a friendly community atmosphere, offering it an ideal place to call home with your loved ones.Property Specifications This stunning flat with a super built-up area of 665 sq ft is a semi-furnished gem and is located on the 6th floor of a 7-story building, providing a picturesque road view and ample natural light throughout the day. Vastu-Shastra friendly, this lovely residence is adorned with vitrified tiles flooring over a carpet area of 425 sq ft which adds beauty to the interiors. Moving to the floor plan, there is a pretty living cum dining area which welcomes you with warmth and love. As you move further, you will find a bedroom and a western-style common bathroom installed with a geyser. The spacious bedroom comes with 3 balconies from where you can view the road, where the 1st balcony is attached to the bedroom, the 2nd balcony opens from the hall, and the 3rd balcony is a utility attached to the kitchen. The modular kitchen is a culinary delight and is installed with a granite platform and a stainless steel sink, ready for your cooking passion. FacilitiesKrishna Villa comes packed with modern amenities such as a 100 power backup facility, ensuring comfort during any power outages. Security is a top priority, with dedicated guards and CCTV surveillance throughout the building. Additionally, there are two high-speed lifts for your convenience. The luxurious amenities include a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, jogging track, and even a barbeque pit, among others. Theres also a dedicated kids club, indoor games room, and meditation area, making it an ideal choice for families. Locality Krishna Villa is strategically located near St. Wilfred School, ensuring easy access to quality education for your children. There are many prominent hospitals, clinics, and nursing homes dotted at 1km, hence quick medical assistance is available. This area has several noted banks, ATM centers, as well as shopping malls and supermarkets at an arms distance that cater to both financial and daily shopping needs. The Bamandongri Railway Station is a 15-minute walk away, providing seamless connectivity to the rest of Navi Mumbai and beyond. This 1 BHK flat in Krishna Villa is not just a property its a lifestyle choice that promises a vibrant community, modern living, and a nurturing environment for you and your family.
